---
title: "About"
subtitle: "A little more about me~"
---

### Basic Information

-   **gender**: male

-   **citizenship**: Chinese

-   **date of birth: 2002.09**

-   **language**: English, Chinese, Cantonese

### education

<div class="topbr">

<p class="custom-subtitle">

{{< fa graduation-cap title="A graduation cap" >}} B.A. in Management Science, 2020-present

</p>

<p class="custom-subtitle2">

Central University of Finance and Economics, China

</p>

### research interests

<div class="topbr">

<p class="custom-subtitle">

{{< fa graduation-cap title="A graduation cap" >}}

</p>

-   **Agricultural Economics**

    </p>

-   **Computational Economics**

    </p>

-   **Macroeconomics**

    </p>

-   **Applied Microeconometrics**

    </p>

-   **Finance**

    </p>

### Habits

-   reading books including the categories of history, biography and fictions.

-   swimming and climbing always relax myself.
